positive: A majestic, highly stylized celestial tiger silhouette leaping through a nebula of cosmic dust. The tiger must be depicted with sharp, clean lines and exaggerated, graceful musculature. It is surrounded by swirling galaxies, vibrant cosmic colors (deep blues, electric violets, neon pinks, and gold accents), and geometric, glowing stellar particles. The composition should be centered and dramatic, allowing the tiger to form a powerful, high-contrast focal point against the swirling, ethereal background. Style: Neo-Art Deco psychedelic cosmic illustration, highly detailed, vector quality, minimal grain, suitable for screen printing on apparel, full body portrait, strong depth of field, volumetric lighting.
